start: Keep this part, delete the rest

ja.title: 行末まで削除する
ja.description: カーソル位置から行末までを削除して Keep this part, だけ残してください
hints: カーソルから行末までを一発で消すコマンドがある
notes: D はカーソル位置から行末までを削除する
d$ も同じ。$ は行末への移動

en.title: Delete to end of line
en.description: Delete from the cursor to the end of the line, leaving 'Keep this part,'
hints: There is a one-key command to delete from the cursor to the end of the line
notes: D deletes from the cursor to the end of the line
d$ does the same; $ is the motion to end of line
